output.headline: 3 pursuits need attention today — CMMI renewal is now urgent

priority_actions.action: Review and approve RS3 Task Order 6 proposal — Pink Team complete, Red Team scheduled for Thursday
Initiate CMMI-DEV ML3 renewal process — certification expires 8/7/2026 (69 days remaining)
Respond to Army Sustainment Command RFI W912PM-26-R-0087 — deadline in 5 business days
Schedule teaming call with Riverstone re: MDA SHIELD sub-opportunity

risk_flags: CMMI-DEV ML3 certification expires in 69 days — 2 active proposals reference this certification

output.market_intel_summary: 3 new Army sustainment opportunities posted on SAM.gov this week matching Envision's NAICS profile. GovTribe signals increased DLA spending in logistics automation — aligns with Envision's C5ISR capabilities.
